source_pr.title: explaintest: use mysql-tester in explaintest
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/45961

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [x] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: This PR migrates the explaintest harness to use mysql-tester and removes a hard failure condition based on grepping `DATA RACE` from the test log. That change is a mitigation/quarantine (it avoids failing when the race detector reports issues) rather than a patch-backed race fix with a concrete root-cause analysis. To avoid over-claiming a specific concurrency root cause, classify as insufficient evidence.
fix_pattern: Mitigate by removing the `DATA RACE` grep-based failure gate in explaintest while migrating the test harness (no concrete flaky signature/root cause captured).

evidence: files: cmd/explaintest/BUILD.bazel, cmd/explaintest/README.md, cmd/explaintest/main.go, cmd/explaintest/main_test.go, cmd/explaintest/r/access_path_selection.result,
